expectations.text: References at least one script by filename
expectations.evidence: References cluster_health.py ('python3 /path/to/k8s-troubleshooter/skills/scripts/cluster_health.py' in Phase 2) and diagnose_pod.py ('python3 /path/to/k8s-troubleshooter/skills/scripts/diagnose_pod.py <namespace> <api-pod-name>' in Phase 3 and Phase 6)

Multiple runnable kubectl commands including 'kubectl describe pod <api-pod-name> -n <namespace>', 'kubectl logs <api-pod-name> -n <namespace> --previous', 'kubectl rollout undo deployment/<api-deployment> -n <namespace>', 'kubectl get endpoints', 'kubectl run tmp-debug --rm -i --tty --image=busybox', and many more

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: References the common issues reference doc: 'consistent with CrashLoopBackOff cause #5 from the skill's common issues reference: Missing dependencies (DB, cache, etc.)' which maps to references/common_issues.md

Follows the exact 6-phase k8s-troubleshooter workflow: Phase 1 Gather Context, Phase 2 Initial Triage, Phase 3 Deep Dive Investigation, Phase 4 Root Cause Analysis, Phase 5 Remediation Steps, Phase 6 Verify and Monitor. Each section is explicitly labeled 'Skill Workflow -- Phase N'

Phase 5 provides structured remediation organized by root cause (Cause A through D), each with specific commands. Includes a decision tree in section 7 and 7 numbered prevention recommendations in section 8
